prompt: Im doing a YC startup take home assignment. I write it down the SPEC.md, I need to do an in deep check of the the file, using the skills to correlate best practices and implementations. use /ai-sdk /vercel-react-best-practices /drizzle-orm /workos /workos-widgets /vercel-composition-patterns /postgres and also, the next version its 16.2.0, and for all other packages, use always @latest tag so we stay up to date.
notes: Deep review of SPEC.md against 8 skill references. Found 21 issues across CRITICAL (6), HIGH (5), MEDIUM (7), LOW (3) categories. Key findings: Next.js 16 needs proxy.ts not middleware.ts, AI Gateway replaces @ai-sdk/openai, UUID v4 PKs cause index fragmentation, missing FK indexes, race condition in user upsert, Sandpack must be lazy-loaded, parsedData JSONB scalability concern, timestamp needs timezone.

prompt: Update SPEC.md with all review findings: Next.js 16.2.0, proxy.ts, UUIDv7, timestamptz, FK indexes, atomic upsert, withAuthHandler HOF, Vercel Blob, Suspense boundaries, lazy-loaded Sandpack, PlanetScale Postgres, AuthKitProvider initialAuth, zod validation, transactions, Promise.all parallelism.
notes: Complete rewrite of SPEC.md applying 18+ corrections across all 16 sections. Key architectural changes: withAuthHandler HOF for SOLID auth, Vercel Blob for file storage (removing parsedData JSONB scalability issue), PlanetScale as DB provider, proxy.ts for Next.js 16, UUIDv7 for index-friendly PKs.

prompt: Deep check of SPEC.md against SOLID principles article, strong typing requirements, and errors-as-values pattern from domain-driven-hexagon repo. Add types/ directory with Result<T,E>, AppError discriminated union, typed component props (ISP), API schemas (zod + interfaces). Add services/ layer returning Result. Add SOLID architecture section mapping each principle to codebase patterns. Updated for React 19 (no forwardRef, use() instead of useContext).
notes: Added 3 new sections to SPEC.md: Section 5 (Types & Interfaces), Section 6 (Error Handling as Values), Section 17 (SOLID Architecture). Added types/ directory with result.ts, errors.ts, api.ts, chat.ts, file.ts, components.ts. Added services/ layer (conversations.ts, messages.ts, files.ts, ai.ts) all returning Result<T,E>. Component props use Interface Segregation - receive only what they render. All sections renumbered (now 19 sections). React 19 patterns: no forwardRef, use() over useContext, ref as regular prop.

prompt: gpt 4.1 mini can read the excel file? check the ai-sdk skill related to file/attachments upload. + ok perfect. continue.
notes: Confirmed gpt-4.1-mini cannot natively read CSV/Excel (only PDFs/images). Current server-side parsing approach is correct. Completed full SPEC.md rewrite to tool-based architecture: replaced regex artifact extraction with AI SDK typed tool parts, added generateArtifact tool with multi-model routing (gpt-4.1-mini analysis → gpt-5.3-codex codegen → gpt-5.4-nano titles), removed ParsedMessage/parse-artifact.ts/artifact DB column, updated all 10 affected sections (2,5,9,10,11,12,13,15,17,18,19).

prompt: check the image, its an example of claude artifacts, how much do you think our architecture and SPEC accurates features this? also check how on the side panel where the sandpack lives, it has a code view too, like you can see the code also.
notes: Compared SPEC to Claude Artifacts screenshot. Added 4 features: (1) Preview/Code toggle in artifact panel via SandpackCodeEditor, renamed artifact-preview to artifact-sandpack. (2) Artifact card inline in chat replacing plain text — styled card with title, icon, Interactive artifact subtitle. (3) Dashboard chartType for multi-chart artifacts with flexible axisMappings array. (4) Collapsible Analysis steps via new analyzeData tool + maxSteps:3 for multi-step chain-of-tools. Updated all affected sections: types/ai.ts, tool definitions, prompts, MessageBubble, ArtifactPanel, layout diagram, data flow, file structure, implementation order.

prompt: I have something on my head: light theme, minimal and clean, not look vibe-coded, with generic shadcn components. I have the fonts with their use cases too and examples images of the chat with different states. its on rebolt-design.md. review EACH image.
notes: Reviewed 5 Rebolt reference images (empty state, input field, sending, analyzing, mid-conversation) and font spec (Inter body, Manrope branding, Geist Mono code). Added Section 13 Visual Design System to SPEC.md covering: typography (3 fonts with roles), color palette (light-only, neutral grays, soft blue accent via Shadcn CSS vars), component styling (input area, messages with blue-tint user bubbles, sidebar, artifact panel, artifact card, empty state, analysis collapsible, file badge), spacing/layout rules, and state visual treatments. Renumbered all subsequent sections 13-19 → 14-20.

prompt: I think that right now the artifact its bias to generating only charts? confirm me this. And It should be general, heres a clear example: examples/ (vacation tracker Excel → PTO Dashboard webapp). The capabilities should be more than just charts. Confirm this bias. + yes lets do that re write.
notes: Confirmed heavy chart bias across 12+ locations in SPEC. Rewrote to general-purpose artifact system: removed chartType enum and axisMappings from tool schema (now just title+description), rewrote both prompts (analysis prompt covers charts/tables/trackers/calendars/forms/kanban, codegen prompt has UI Patterns section for each type with styling guidelines), updated tool descriptions, overview, architecture diagram, data flow, Sandpack tradeoffs, SOLID section. Recharts remains available as a dependency but is not the default or only option.

prompt: Implement Phase 1 of the Rebolt AI MVP. Reference SPEC.md for all code — write files exactly as specified. Dependencies install, types/, db/, auth (proxy.ts, callback, layout), lib/api.ts, globals.css, .env.local.example, error-boundary.tsx.
notes: Phase 1 complete. Installed 15 production + 3 dev dependencies. Created 7 type files, 2 db files, drizzle.config.ts, proxy.ts, auth callback, root layout with AuthKitProvider + 3 fonts (Inter/Manrope/Geist Mono), withAuthHandler HOF, globals.css with Shadcn light theme tokens, ErrorBoundary class component, .env.local.example. Fixed NotFoundError missing message field in errorResponse(), fixed @workos-inc/node import (used UserInfo from authkit-nextjs instead). Generated Drizzle migration. Zero type errors.

prompt: Move to src/ folder structure. + Remove standalone /app references from docs.
notes: Moved app/, types/, lib/, services/, hooks/, components/, db/ into src/. Updated tsconfig.json path alias to ./src/*, drizzle.config.ts schema path to ./src/db/schema.ts. Updated all bare directory references in CLAUDE.md, strategy.md, README.md to use src/ prefix. Cleared stale .next cache. proxy.ts stays at root (Next.js 16 requirement). Zero type errors after move.

prompt: Fix Drizzle pgTable deprecation warning — extraConfig third parameter should return array instead of object.
notes: Updated conversations, messages, and files table definitions to use new array syntax for extraConfig: (table) => [...] instead of (table) => ({...}). Drizzle 0.45+ deprecation fix.

prompt: Implement Phase 2 of the Rebolt AI MVP. Services layer (conversations, files, messages, ai) and API routes (conversations CRUD, upload). All services return Result<T, E>.
notes: Phase 2 complete. Created 4 service files: conversations.ts (CRUD with Result pattern), files.ts (validation + CSV/XLSX parsing via Papa Parse and SheetJS), messages.ts (transactional persistence), ai.ts (title generation with gpt-5.4-nano structured output). Created 3 API route files: conversations route (GET list + POST create), conversations/[id] route (GET detail + DELETE), upload route (validate → parse → Vercel Blob → DB metadata). All routes wrapped in withAuthHandler, errors mapped via errorResponse. Committed on feat/phase-2-services-and-api branch. Zero type errors.

prompt: Implement Phase 3 of the Rebolt AI MVP. System prompts (buildAnalysisPrompt + buildCodegenPrompt) and POST /api/chat route with streamText, analyzeData + generateArtifact tools, multi-model routing. + Refactor tools out of route into lib/tools.ts for SOLID compliance.
notes: Phase 3 complete. Created lib/system-prompt.ts (analysis prompt for gpt-4.1-mini with tool chain strategy, codegen prompt for gpt-5.3-codex with UI patterns and styling guidelines). Created lib/tools.ts (createChatTools factory — analyzeData + generateArtifact with multi-model routing via generateText inside execute). Created app/api/chat/route.ts (thin route: validate → auth → fetch context → streamText with tools → toUIMessageStreamResponse). Fixed 3 type issues: AI SDK uses stopWhen+stepCountIs instead of maxSteps, Result narrowing for fileResult, explicit row typing. Refactored tools out of route into lib/tools.ts for Single Responsibility. Route went from 83 to 35 lines. Zero type errors.

prompt: Decouple 3 inline fetch() calls from components following SOLID principles. Research Next.js 16 docs for best practice (Server Actions vs client API). Implement server actions for create/delete conversation, thin client function for file upload.
notes: Researched Next.js 16 docs — Server Actions recommended over client-side fetch for mutations (built-in CSRF, type safety, no HTTP round-trip). Created src/actions/conversations.ts with createConversation and removeConversation server actions calling services directly. Created src/lib/api-client.ts with uploadFile (kept as fetch — file uploads better suited to route handlers). Updated chat-empty-state.tsx, sidebar.tsx, message-input.tsx to use actions/client functions. Deleted unused src/hooks/use-conversations.ts. Removed dead /api/conversations route handlers (GET routes consumed directly by server components via service layer, POST/DELETE replaced by server actions). Zero type errors.

prompt: Fix two UX problems: (1) can't attach files on new chat (no conversationId exists), (2) jarring skeleton flash when sending first message (router.push triggers loading.tsx). Plan and implement seamless transition.
notes: Planned client-side state machine approach — swap ChatEmptyState for ChatPanel via React state change instead of page navigation. URL updates via window.history.replaceState (bypasses Next.js routing, no loading.tsx). Applied Vercel best practices: after() for non-blocking title generation (1-3s LLM call deferred), useTransition for isPending state. Changes: (1) actions/conversations.ts — createConversation returns messageId + accepts optional existingConversationId, new createConversationOnly for file attach, after() for title gen. (2) api-client.ts — uploadFile returns UploadResponse. (3) chat/page.tsx — passes userInitials/userAvatarUrl. (4) chat-empty-state.tsx — state machine with Phase 1 (empty + file attach) and Phase 2 (inline ChatPanel). Fixed router.refresh() causing skeleton by removing it — revalidatePath in server action handles sidebar update. Zero type errors.

prompt: Fix bug: file attachments uploaded mid-conversation don't show as badges. Root cause: MessageInput has no local file state, relies on files prop from ChatPanel which becomes [] after first send. Also unify the two separate input components (ChatEmptyState input vs MessageInput) into one.
notes: Created useFileUpload hook (owns pendingFiles, isUploading, uploadError state), ComposerInput component (unified presentational input). Updated ChatEmptyState and ChatPanel to use hook+component. Deleted MessageInput. Fixed with sentFilesMap (Map<number, files[]>) replacing single fileSentAtIndex. Applied Vercel composition patterns: shared input component, layout differs per context.

prompt: Merge ChatEmptyState + ChatPanel into single ChatView component. Two components independently manage same concern — file state doesn't survive empty→active transition, duplicated prop threading, unnecessary dynamic import.
notes: Created ChatView with dual conversation IDs: fileConversationId (available on file upload for useFileUpload) and chatConversationId (only set when messages ready for useAppChat — prevents useChat initializing with empty messages). Key insights: useChat initializes once per id and won't re-read messages prop, so ID must only be passed when initial messages are ready. Updated useAppChat to accept null conversationId with placeholder. Fixed 3 sequential bugs: blank chat (no initial messages fed to hook), premature URL redirect on file upload (URL now updates only when createdMessages populated), file+text send doing nothing (send handler checked wrong condition).

prompt: Modularize ChatView (288 lines) into focused hooks without breaking behavior. Extract ToolInvocationPart from MessageBubble.
notes: Extracted 4 hooks: useConversation (conversation lifecycle, creation, IDs, URL update — 93 lines), useSentFiles (file-to-message tracking — 26 lines), useAutoReply (trigger assistant reply — 47 lines), useArtifact (derive artifact + error state — 41 lines). ChatView reduced to 154 lines as thin orchestrator. Extracted ToolInvocationPart (96 lines) from MessageBubble (176→81 lines). Also parallelized createConversation: replaced sequential createInitialUserMessage + after(generateTitle) with Promise.all.

prompt: Make Sandpack codegen produce multi-file projects with folder structure (like v0), not single-file. Add file explorer to artifact panel code view.
notes: Transformed artifact system from single-file to multi-file project generation. (1) Types: ArtifactToolOutput.code → .files (Record<string,string>), same for ArtifactState and ArtifactPanelProps. (2) Tool: switched from plain generateText to Output.object() structured output with z.record schema, maxOutputTokens 8192→16384. (3) Codegen prompt: rewrote for multi-file output — project structure rules (/src/App.tsx entry, /src/data.ts, /src/components/*.tsx, /src/hooks/*.ts, /src/lib/utils.ts), import rules, file count guidance (3-8 files), example structure. (4) Sandpack: accepts files map, adds hidden /index.tsx entry, SandpackFileExplorer sidebar in code view (180-220px) + SandpackCodeEditor side-by-side. (5) Artifact card shows file count. 9 files changed, 0 new files. Zero type errors.

prompt: Act as a skeptical code auditor. Independently verify analysis.md against the real codebase, check every claim marked implemented/missing, hunt for blind spots, simulate the evaluator flow, and produce a brutal verification report with evidence and prioritized fixes.
notes: Completed a full claim-by-claim verification of analysis.md against the source. Produced a verified audit covering true positives, overstatements, and missed issues; identified the core YC blocker as missing runtime-error promotion into app state and no autonomous correction loop from real artifact failures.

prompt: Write the final verified audit into report.md, including the prior analysis findings, corrections, blind spots, evaluator simulation, and critical fixes in priority order.
notes: Created report.md as the consolidated verification report. Included the corrected status of prior claims, new findings the prior audit missed, the evaluator-perspective walkthrough, and the minimum implementation roadmap to reach convincing self-correction behavior.

prompt: Implement the demo-critical self-correction plan: autonomous artifact retries via regenerate(), structured artifactRetry payloads, Sandpack runtime/timeout capture, visible tool output errors, stricter codegen validation, pinned runtime versions, and retry UI/status handling.
notes: Implemented the evaluator-critical correction path end-to-end. Added pinned active artifact state, structured artifactRetry payloads, Sandpack runtime/notification/timeout bridging, automatic regenerate() retries, output-error rendering, stricter generateArtifact validation, retry-aware chat callbacks, and shared pinned sandbox/runtime versions. Typecheck passed and lint passed with only two pre-existing warnings.

prompt: Implement the prompt fidelity and retry-context plan: fix the sample-data mismatch, make codegen honest about sampled rows, and enrich retry prompts with the original user request plus schema summary derived server-side.
notes: Aligned prompt honesty with actual stored data. Analysis and codegen prompts now share dataset context, codegen uses the stored sample intentionally and no longer claims access to unseen rows, and artifact retry prompts now include the original user request plus compact schema context without inflating the browser payload.

prompt: Replace preview-only artifact data with full-dataset support. Parse and persist full uploads, raise the column limit to 150, add full-dataset analysis/read tools, bind artifacts and retries to fileId, and make generated artifacts load the real dataset at runtime instead of embedding sampled rows.
notes: Implemented full-dataset artifacts. Uploads now parse and persist the full normalized dataset, sampleData is prompt-only, maxColumns is 150, analyzeData/readDatasetRows operate on the full dataset, and generated artifacts are forced to use an injected rebolt-dataset helper. Because Sandpack previews are cross-origin, the runtime helper fetches a per-file normalized dataset blob URL instead of an authenticated same-origin API route. Old artifact retries remain pinned to their original fileId, and the 100-row artifact limitation was removed.

prompt: Modularize src/components/artifact-panel.tsx and src/components/artifact-sandpack.tsx to keep behavior identical while making the components smaller and more SOLID-compliant. Do not break the current retry/runtime flow.
notes: Split artifact panel and Sandpack preview into focused subcomponents: panel empty state, panel header, status footer, Sandpack runtime bridge, preview pane, and code pane. Added shared artifact panel/view types in src/types/components.ts. Kept behavior unchanged. Typecheck passed, and lint still shows only the two pre-existing warnings in file-upload-badge.tsx and user-card.tsx.

prompt: Modularize src/components/chat-view.tsx using composition-oriented scene components and small support hooks, while keeping the current conversation, upload, auto-reply, artifact, and retry behavior unchanged.
notes: Split ChatView into explicit empty state, conversation pane, transcript/messages pane, and artifact sidebar components. Added a small artifact request relay hook to keep useAppChat callback wiring stable while reducing inline ref/effect complexity. Preserved the top-level orchestration in ChatView so existing behavior stays intact. Typecheck passed, and lint still shows only the two pre-existing warnings in file-upload-badge.tsx and user-card.tsx.

prompt: Modularize src/hooks/use-artifact.ts without changing its public API or retry behavior. Move the pure artifact parsing/retry payload logic and the small lifecycle effects into focused helper hooks/files, and keep the state machine behavior unchanged.
notes: Split useArtifact into smaller internal units without changing consumers. Extracted pure artifact/message helpers into src/hooks/use-artifact-helpers.ts, moved active-artifact synchronization into src/hooks/use-artifact-active-state.ts, and isolated the latest tool-error auto-retry effect in src/hooks/use-artifact-tool-error-retry.ts. Kept the retry state machine, callbacks, and returned API in use-artifact.ts. Typecheck passed, lint passed, and the Sandpack pane import names were corrected so the existing earlier refactor still compiled cleanly.

prompt: Modularize src/lib/system-prompt.ts while keeping the exported prompt builders and prompt wording stable. Move the dataset/profile formatting helpers and static prompt sections into focused modules so system-prompt.ts becomes a small composition layer.
notes: Split system-prompt.ts into focused server-only prompt modules. Extracted dataset/profile formatting and retry schema helpers into src/lib/system-prompt-data.ts, moved static prompt copy blocks into src/lib/system-prompt-sections.ts, and kept src/lib/system-prompt.ts as the public composition layer exporting the same prompt builders. Typecheck passed and lint passed.

prompt: Modularize src/lib/tools.ts into a tools folder while keeping createChatTools and tool behavior unchanged. Extract the per-tool factories and the pure artifact parsing / dataset helper logic into focused modules, and leave src/lib/tools.ts as the public composition entry.
notes: Split the large server tools module into a focused tools/ folder. Extracted constants, artifact file parsing/validation, dataset runtime helper injection, dataset column selection helpers, and one factory module per tool: analyzeData, readDatasetRows, and generateArtifact. Kept src/lib/tools.ts as the public createChatTools entry so callers did not change. Typecheck passed and lint passed.

prompt: Rename the grouped src/components folders from Next-style parentheses to plain feature folders after verifying that route-group syntax is only meaningful under app/. Update all imports, keep behavior unchanged, and leave the component organization intact.
notes: Checked AGENTS.md guidance plus the local Next docs and confirmed route groups are an App Router convention, not a component-folder convention. Renamed src/components/(artifact|chat|message|sidebar|shared) to src/components/artifact, src/components/chat, src/components/message, src/components/sidebar, and src/components/shared. Updated all imports accordingly. Typecheck passed and lint passed.
